207192950.title: REGARDING THE DISCOUNT FOR WHOLESALER COOPERATION
207192950.description: Customers who place orders of more than 300 pairs each month can place orders directly through the broker. At the end of each month, please provide us with the order number to count the orders, and we will refund the discount amount. The discount amount can be negotiated with us
